index 1234567..abcdefg 100644
--- a/app/models/user.rb
+++ b/app/models/user.rb
@@ -1,5 +1,10 @@
 class User < ApplicationRecord
   validates :email, presence: true
+  validates :name, presence: true, length: { maximum: 100 }
+
+  def full_name
+    "#{first_name} #{last_name}"
+  end
 end
